title: Section 14
content: 1[14. Punishment for habitual offender.-- Whoever convicted of an offence under this Act subsequently commits an offence punishable under this Act, shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than five years but which may extend to ten years and shall also be liable to fine.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 16 of 2018, s. 8, for section 14 (w.e.f. 26-7-2018).
